name: calendar-01
title: Calendar 01
author: ilinxa
description: Read-only calendar over the canonical TodoItem[] — the date-grid sibling of gantt-timeline-01. Four views: a month grid (multi-day spanning bars + chips + "+N more" overflow), week & day hour time-grids (all-day band + lane-packed timed blocks + now-line), and a day-grouped agenda. Period navigation, view switching, an optional jump-to-date mini-nav, native-title hover tooltips (renderTooltip lazy-embeds the full TodoRichCard), selection, and keyboard shortcuts. All-day vs timed vs milestone is derived (consumer predicate → date-only strings parsed floating-local → span heuristic); status/urgency color is imported from todo-rich-card so it matches the card + gantt. The v0.2 editing surface is declared but inert in v1. Ships shadcn-style: a batteries-included <Calendar01> plus a headless <Calendar01Root> + flat à-la-carte view parts + Tier-C primitives, so a month-only subset drops the week/day time-grid code.
